title: coreopsis lopez-mirandae
intro: Coreopsis lopez-mirandae, also known as the Lopez-Miranda Coreopsis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Coreopsis lopez-mirandae include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its use in treating various health conditions. Coreopsis lopez-mirandae is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are believed to provide its medicinal benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
